hero.eyebrow: Hefei Huanlian Technology · Implantable BCI System
hero.title: AstroMind
hero.lede: Self-controlled high-throughput neural acquisition, implantable electrodes, stimulation and clinical translation. Full-stack BCI from research to in-hospital rehabilitation.

intro.title: Hefei Huanlian — Anhui's leading implantable BCI company
intro.lede: Hefei Huanlian Technology (AstroMind) specializes in implantable BCI systems R&D and industrialization, covering high-end implantable electrodes, high-throughput acquisition, and research services. Core team: materials science, micro-nano fabrication, chip design, neuroelectrophysiology, algorithms — with mastered tech in dissolvable neural materials, silicon-probe nanofabrication, and high-frequency signal acquisition.

cap.p1: SpikeLink wireless implant, Michigan silicon, ECoG flexible, microwire electrodes, NeuroBox 2048-channel, HD-MEA.
cap.p2: Lab solutions, animal models, clinical translation, neural data analysis, 3-year academic partnerships.
cap.p3: Rehab robots, exoskeletons, transcranial stim, TI interferometric — joint digital rehab centers with top hospitals.
cap.p4: EEG caps, wave testers, emotion analyzers, BCI glasses — wearables for daily health.

pipe.title: From implant interface to clinical translation
pipe.sub: Three scenes — lab, clinic, at-home — covered by five solutions and four product lines.
pipe.p1: Michigan silicon, ECoG flexible, microwire arrays — Spike + LFP + microstimulation.
pipe.p2: NeuroBox host, Headstage, MPM multi-arm targeting, Neuropixels-ready.
pipe.p3: NeuroAnalysis, AI signal parsing, spike sorting, correlated encoding.
pipe.p4: SpikeLink full-implant, rehab suites, TI / transcranial mod, at-home BCI.

launch.title: Anhui BCI Alliance · Implantable BCI Launch
launch.lede: As a member of the Anhui BCI Alliance, Huanlian co-launched a domestic implantable BCI series, advancing high-throughput neural interfaces from lab to clinic.

apps.title: Application Domains
apps.p1: Multi-channel in-vivo electrophysiology, optogenetics, long-term stable recording, precise brain-region targeting — for circuits and coding research.
apps.p2: SpikeLink wireless full-implant + brain-controlled exoskeleton — motor decoding, closed-loop rehab, neural modulation.
apps.p3: Joint digital rehab center with Anhui Provincial Hospital — limbs, hand, cognitive, speech, swallowing.
apps.p4: EEG caps, emotion analyzers, BCI glasses — wearables that bring BCI to daily life.

partners.title: Research & Clinical Partners
partners.sub: Serving research institutions across China, with clinical collaborations at top hospitals.
partners.p1: USTC · XJTU · Xidian · Shaanxi University of Chinese Medicine
partners.p2: Wannan Medical · Anhui Medical · Capital Medical · Southern Medical
partners.p3: First Affiliated Hospital of AHMU · Hefei Fourth People's Hospital · Tiantan Anhui Hospital · Zhujiang Hospital · Zhanjiang Central Hospital
partners.p4: Anhui Provincial Hospital — joint nationwide flagship digital BCI rehab center.

contact.title: Hefei Huanlian Technology Co., Ltd.
contact.addr: Address: Bailee Center South Tower 318, 888 Qianshan Rd, Shushan District, Hefei, Anhui, China

hero.title: Implantable BCI Stack
hero.lede: A full-stack pipeline: biocompatible electrodes, low-noise high-throughput acquisition, smart targeting, real-time signal analytics — all self-controlled.

core.title: Three core capabilities
core.lede: Core team across materials science, micro-nano fabrication, chip design, neuroelectrophysiology, and algorithms — with mastered tech in dissolvable neural materials, silicon-probe nanofabrication, and high-frequency signal acquisition. The foundation for high-throughput implantable BCI.

stack.title: Four technology modules
stack.p1: Michigan silicon (32–256 ch), ECoG flexible cortical electrodes, PEG-encapsulated microwire arrays — Spike + LFP + ECoG full-band recording, optogenetics-compatible, microstim-ready.
stack.p2: NeuroBox host + Headstage 32/64-ch front-end + 2 m serial cable — 0–30 kHz on-line sampling, live bandwidth tuning, multi-channel impedance.
stack.p3: MPM multi-arm targeting platform — parallel implantation of multiple electrodes / fibers / injectors, Neuropixels-recommended.
stack.p4: NeuroAnalysis: real-time waveform, binary store, one-click spike sorting, peri-event analysis, AI signal parsing & visualization.

lab.title: From lab bench to rehab ward
lab.lede: Hardware, software, and services validated end-to-end across research labs and clinical wards.

ext.title: Extended capabilities
ext.sub: Beyond the core acquisition pipeline, Huanlian offers complete coverage of animal-experiment simulation, in-vitro cell analysis, and neural data services.
ext.p1: 270° multi-screen + motion platform + dual-GPU host — immersive virtual-environment animal experiments.
ext.p2: Real-time label-free in-vitro cell function, development, connectivity, morphology — phenotyping, disease modeling, drug discovery.
ext.p3: Denoising, spike sorting, time-series analysis, correlated coding, batch processing, paper-grade visualization.
ext.p4: Custom neuroscience / BCI animal models — standardized modeling, husbandry, behavior, sample prep — fit for implant validation.

academic.title: Academic services & 3-year research partnership
academic.lede: Team led by national-level talent, with multiple high-impact SCI papers per year. Lead investigator holds joint professor appointments at top hospitals. Services: top-journal support, national-level grant guidance, research differentiation, lab exchange, international collaboration, talent recruitment. The 3-year partnership program builds research foundation, drives output, and grows sustainable BCI capability for hospital teams.

hero.title: Medical + Research full suite
hero.lede: From SpikeLink wireless implant, to NeuroBox 2048-channel acquisition, Michigan / ECoG / microwire electrodes, MPM targeting, and HD-MEA in-vitro arrays — implant to software.

modules.title: Product modules
modules.p1Body: Huanlian's medical-grade flagship — a wireless full-implant BCI for clinical use. Pairs with NeuroBox / electrodes / software to close the loop across lab, clinic, and at-home. See the Anhui BCI Alliance launch PDF for technical specs.
modules.p2Body: Michigan silicon (32–256 ch, ultra-thin shanks, optogenetics-compatible) ｜ ECoG flexible cortical (long-term LFP tracking, multi-region observation) ｜ Microwire (PEG-encapsulated precise insertion, 2–14 mm exposure, Spike/LFP + microstimulation).
modules.p3Body: NeuroBox host (2048-ch) ｜ Headstage front-end (32/64-ch + 2 m serial) ｜ MPM multi-arm targeting (parallel multi-electrode / fiber / injector) ｜ Neuropixels-ready ultra-high-throughput digital probes.
modules.p4Body: NeuroAnalysis (real-time waveform, 0–30 kHz sampling, impedance, one-click sorting) ｜ VR animal-behavior simulator (270° multi-screen + dual-GPU) ｜ HD-MEAs in-vitro arrays (real-time label-free cell function, development, connectivity, morphology).

services.title: Research support services
services.p1: Lab solutions: 2048-ch host + full electrode lineup + AI signal parsing + visualization platform — turnkey delivery.
services.p2: Animal models: standardized modeling, husbandry, behavior, sample prep — fit for circuit research, pharmacology, implant validation.
services.p3: Clinical translation: lab / clinic / at-home — five solutions and four product lines covering non-invasive and implantable paths.
services.p4: Neural data analysis: denoising, spike sorting, time-series & correlated coding, batch processing, paper-grade output.
services.p5: Academic services: top-journal support, national grant guidance, international collaboration, 3-year partnership program.
services.p6: Rehabilitation suite: rehab robots, exoskeleton, limb / hand / cognitive / speech / swallowing training, TI & transcranial modulation.

launch.title: Launch material
launch.lede: Anhui BCI Alliance co-launch of implantable BCI series — full launch package includes SpikeLink visuals, technical specs, and on-site photography.

hero.title: Equipment catalog & quote
hero.lede: Medical-grade and research-grade equipment ships through tailored quotes — configure to your protocol or clinical workflow.

spikelink.title: Wireless full-implant BCI
spikelink.body: Flagship clinical wireless implant — closes the loop across lab, clinic, and at-home with NeuroBox / electrodes / software.

ecog.title: ECoG flexible cortical array
ecog.body: High conformability for long-term LFP tracking and multi-region cortical recording.

michigan.title: Michigan silicon probe
michigan.body: 32–256 channels, ultra-thin shanks, optogenetics-compatible — Spike + LFP for stable in-vivo recording.

microwire.title: Microwire array
microwire.body: PEG-encapsulated microwires for precise insertion — Spike/LFP + microstimulation.

neurobox.title: NeuroBox 2048-channel host
neurobox.body: 2048-channel host, 0–30 kHz on-line sampling, live bandwidth tuning, multi-channel impedance.

mpm.title: MPM multi-arm targeting
mpm.body: Multi-electrode / fiber / injector parallel targeting — Neuropixels-recommended.

headstage.title: 32/64-ch headstage
headstage.body: Dedicated headstage + 2 m serial cable, low-noise preconditioning, NeuroBox-ready.

software.title: NeuroAnalysis suite
software.body: Real-time waveform, binary storage, one-click spike sorting, peri-event analysis.

vr.title: VR behavior system
vr.body: 270° multi-screen + motion platform + dual-GPU host — immersive animal behavior.

hdmea.title: In-vitro HD-MEA
hdmea.body: Real-time label-free in-vitro cell function, development, connectivity, morphology — phenotyping, disease modeling, drug discovery.

exo.title: Brain-controlled exoskeleton
exo.body: Motor-intent decoding + closed-loop rehab — limbs, hand, and neural modulation.

ti.title: Temporal interference stim
ti.body: Non-invasive deep-brain stimulation — paired with transcranial EEG/MEG modulation.

robot.title: Rehab robot
robot.body: Cognitive / speech / swallowing rehab robots — deploy with digital rehab centers.

eeg.title: Consumer EEG cap
eeg.body: Multi-channel EEG capture with cloud analytics for personalized health management.

emotion.title: Emotion analyzer
emotion.body: Portable wearable for mental wellness, stress, and remote care.

glasses.title: BCI glasses
glasses.body: BCI + eye-tracking + focus feedback for study aid and daily-life productivity.

order.title: Quote, procurement & customization
order.lede: Specify use case (research / clinical / at-home), channel & electrode spec, institution & procurement type. We reply with a full configuration and quote within 1-2 business days.
